author: design-phase-1a-reactive--695956
content:
Result: Implemented complete vitreous_reactive crate — signal-based reactivity system.

Delivered:
- runtime.rs: Custom SlotMap with generational arena, thread-local Runtime with all slot types
- graph.rs: Dependency edge tracking, transitive staleness push, subscriber notification
- signal.rs: Signal<T> with get/get_untracked/set/update/read_only, ReadSignal<T>
- memo.rs: Memo<T> with lazy recomputation, PartialEq filtering via changed_in_cycle flag
- effect.rs: Effect with auto-tracking, immediate initial run
- batch.rs: batch() with nested support, flush_effects() with should_run_effect pre-check
- scope.rs: Scope with Drop cleanup in reverse order
- context.rs: provide_context/use_context/try_use_context with parent chain walk
- resource.rs: Resource<S,T> with pluggable executor and generation-based cancellation
- lib.rs: Public API re-exports + 22 tests covering AC-1 through AC-13

All acceptance criteria tested:
- AC-1: Signal get/set ✓
- AC-2: Memo recomputation on dep change ✓
- AC-3: Memo PartialEq filtering (clamping) ✓
- AC-4: Effect initial fire + per-change ✓
- AC-5: batch coalesces to single effect ✓
- AC-6: Diamond dependency glitch-free ✓
- AC-7: Scope cleanup stops effects ✓
- AC-8: Context propagation across scopes ✓
- AC-9: try_use_context returns None ✓
- AC-10: Resource loading/data states ✓
- AC-11: get_untracked no dependency ✓
- AC-12: read_only returns ReadSignal ✓
- AC-13: No Send/Sync bounds (Signal<Rc<RefCell<Vec<String>>>>) ✓
- AC-14: Property test (deferred — needs proptest dep)
- AC-15: Benchmark (deferred — needs criterion dep)

Checks: cargo test 22/22, clippy clean, fmt clean, full workspace compiles
